message:
chore: add missing ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Prevent accidental commits of runtime artifacts, build outputs,
agent-generated scratch files, SQLite corruption snapshots, and
other ephemeral files that were showing up as untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,6 +103,11 @@ storage.recovered.sqlite3
 # Ephemeral scratch files
 baseline_decisions
 
+# System trace/debug logs
+strace.log
+strace*.log
+ltrace*.log
+
 # Remote compilation helper artifacts
 .rch-target/
 .rch-deploy-root/
